message:
fix(agent): use spec.agents instead of spec.capabilities for delegation fallback

The non-tree fallback in getDelegatableAgents iterated spec.capabilities,
which is a mixed bag of tool names and agent names. This caused agents to
incorrectly resolve delegation targets from tool names in capabilities.
Now iterates spec.agents, the dedicated field for agent references.

Also fix YAML round-trip: serializeAgentSpec now writes tools/agents fields,
and parseAgentSpec reads them when present (falling back to "/" heuristic
for legacy YAML without explicit tools/agents).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -662,6 +662,8 @@ export function serializeAgentSpec(spec: AgentSpec): string {
 		description: spec.description,
 		model: spec.model,
 		capabilities: spec.capabilities,
+		tools: spec.tools,
+		agents: spec.agents,
 		constraints: spec.constraints,
 		tags: spec.tags,
 		system_prompt: spec.system_prompt,

@@ -38,6 +38,8 @@ const ORCHESTRATOR_AGENT_SPEC = {
 	description: "An orchestrator that delegates to test-leaf",
 	model: "best",
 	capabilities: ["test-leaf"],
+	tools: [],
+	agents: ["test-leaf"],
 	constraints: {
 		max_turns: 5,
 		max_depth: 2,
